metadata.title: Zhiwei - Professional Software Development Studio
metadata.description: Zhiwei is a boutique studio specializing in web development, app development, system development, mini-programs, AI/data, and e-commerce solutions

hero.title: Zhiwei
hero.subtitle: Craft Digital, Ship Craft
hero.description: Small team, meticulous craft. Web, apps & systems.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: End-to-end technical solutions from concept to launch

website.title: Web Development
website.description: Corporate websites, landing pages, web apps with responsive design and optimal performance

app.title: App Development
app.description: iOS and Android native apps, cross-platform solutions with smooth user experiences

system.title: System Development
system.description: Management systems, admin platforms, SaaS products - efficient and stable enterprise solutions

miniapp.title: Mini Programs
miniapp.description: WeChat and Alipay mini programs, lightweight solutions to reach users quickly

ai.title: AI / Data
ai.description: Intelligent automation, data analytics, machine learning integration for data-driven decisions

ecommerce.title: E-commerce
ecommerce.description: Online stores, payment integration, inventory management - complete e-commerce solutions

portfolio.title: Selected Work
portfolio.subtitle: Every project is a fusion of technology and creativity

story.title: Our Story
story.content: Zhiwei was founded with a simple mission - to help anyone with an idea bring their digital dreams to life. We believe great software doesn't require a massive team, just a passion for technology and attention to detail.

quality.title: Quality First
quality.description: Every line of code is carefully crafted, pursuing卓越 user experiences

innovation.description: Staying at the technology frontier, providing the most suitable solutions
